--- Loxodon — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Loxodon — Unarmored Caster casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
Loxodon — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Loxodon — Unarmored Caster for 6. HP: 20/67

→ Concentration save: [23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
